Defendant Curtis N Crane Mds Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories Set Two
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brendan C. Gannon, of Hersh and Hersh, Tel. 415.441.5544, for plaintiffs;
Robert M. Ferrier, of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel. 925.222.3400, for defendants.

Prior to the hearing, the parties met and conferred and reached some agreement on the topic of social media.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT CURTIS CRANE Md's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories Set Two is granted in part, and denied in part. Counsel shall produce further verified responses in regards to social media from May 2012 to present, and any social media relating to the physical elements as a result of smoking. Plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.

Defendant Curtis N Crane Mds Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set Two
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brendan C. Gannon, of Hersh and Hersh, Tel. 415.441.5544, for plaintiffs;
Robert M. Ferrier, of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel. 925.222.3400, for defendants.

Prior to the hearing, the parties met and conferred and reached some agreement on the topic of social media.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT CURTIS CRANE Md's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set Two is granted in part, and denied in part. Counsel shall produce further verified responses in regards to social media from May 2012 to present, and any social media relating to the physical elements as a result of smoking. Plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.
